columns.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Zehavi et al. 2005 (arXiv:astro-ph/0408569), Figure 8 top-right panel, M_r < -21 red open triangles
extraction_method: visually digitized from arXiv source f8.ps converted to PNG at 200dpi
triple_check: rp values span 0.16-16.4 h^-1 Mpc (11 log-spaced bins, Δlog r=0.2)
wp values decrease monotonically from 560 to 9.5 h^-1 Mpc — physically expected
wp_err is ~5-30% of wp — consistent with jackknife errors from figure
units: both rp and wp in h^-1 Mpc (Zehavi+2005 uses h^-1 Mpc throughout)
pi_max=40 h^-1 Mpc confirmed from Zehavi+2005 Section 3
notes: WMAP3 cosmology from Table 2 of Zheng+2007. Published HOD params from Table 3, M_r < -21 row.
